conditional: A decision on Nico Páz's future will be made later this week after a meeting between Real Madrid and Como on Thursday.
headline: Nico Páz future decision pending between Real Madrid, Como
body: Real Madrid and Como are scheduled to meet on Thursday to determine the future of Nico Páz, with Real preferring to activate a €9m buy-back clause and sell him, while Como aims to retain him under current conditions.
text:
🚨 Nico Páz future to be decided later this week as Real Madrid and Como will meet on Thursday.

Real prefer to activate €9m buy back clause and sell the player, Como to keep current deal conditions.

Decision to follow later this week.
